Interface Overview

The miraX interface consists of:

  • Top Menu
  • Sidebar
  • Search Bar
  • Map Viewer
  • Toolboxes

Top Menu

Provides access to:

  • Project and file management
  • View and display controls
  • Language selection
  • Theme settings
  • Help and guidance tools

Sidebar

Used to manage:

  • Layers
  • Basemaps
  • Networks
  • Toolbars
  • Models
  • Simulations

Search Bar

Allows users to search for:

  • Addresses
  • Locations

Map Viewer

Central area for:

  • Visualization
  • Interaction
  • Spatial analysis

Toolboxes

Provides access to advanced tools depending on user permissions.
